import json

with open\('/tmp/supabase-openapi.json'\) as f:
    spec = json.load\(f\)

defs = spec.get\('definitions', {}\)

def pg_type_to_ts\(prop\):
    fmt = prop.get\('format', ''\)
    typ = prop.get\('type', ''\)
    
    if fmt in \('bigint', 'integer', 'smallint', 'numeric', 'double precision', 'real'\):
        return 'number'
    if fmt == 'boolean':
        return 'boolean'
    if fmt in \('uuid', 'text', 'character varying', 'date', 'time', 'timestamp with time zone', 'timestamp without time zone', 'timestamptz', 'interval'\):
        return 'string'
    if fmt == 'jsonb' or fmt == 'json':
        return 'Json'
    if fmt == 'ARRAY':
        items = prop.get\('items', {}\)
        inner = pg_type_to_ts\(items\)
        return f'{inner}[]'
    
    if typ == 'integer' or typ == 'number':
        return 'number'
    if typ == 'boolean':
        return 'boolean'
    if typ == 'string':
        return 'string'
    if typ == 'array':
        items = prop.get\('items', {}\)
        inner = pg_type_to_ts\(items\)
        return f'{inner}[]'
    
    return 'string'

lines = []
lines.append\('export type Json ='\)
lines.append\('  | string'\)
lines.append\('  | number'\)
lines.append\('  | boolean'\)
lines.append\('  | null'\)
lines.append\('  | { [key: string]: Json | undefined }'\)
lines.append\('  | Json[]'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('export type Database = {'\)
lines.append\('  public: {'\)
lines.append\('    Tables: {'\)

for table_name in sorted\(defs.keys\(\)\):
    table_def = defs[table_name]
    props = table_def.get\('properties', {}\)
    required = set\(table_def.get\('required', []\)\)
    
    lines.append\(f'      {table_name}: {{'\)
    
    # Row type
    lines.append\('        Row: {'\)
    for col_name in sorted\(props.keys\(\)\):
        col = props[col_name]
        ts_type = pg_type_to_ts\(col\)
        nullable = col_name not in required
        if nullable:
            lines.append\(f'          {col_name}: {ts_type} | null'\)
        else:
            lines.append\(f'          {col_name}: {ts_type}'\)
    lines.append\('        }'\)
    
    # Insert type
    lines.append\('        Insert: {'\)
    for col_name in sorted\(props.keys\(\)\):
        col = props[col_name]
        ts_type = pg_type_to_ts\(col\)
        has_default = col.get\('default'\) is not None or col.get\('description', ''\).startswith\('Note:'\)
        nullable = col_name not in required
        optional = nullable or has_default or col_name in \('id', 'created_at', 'updated_at'\)
        if optional:
            lines.append\(f'          {col_name}?: {ts_type} | null'\)
        else:
            lines.append\(f'          {col_name}: {ts_type}'\)
    lines.append\('        }'\)
    
    # Update type
    lines.append\('        Update: {'\)
    for col_name in sorted\(props.keys\(\)\):
        col = props[col_name]
        ts_type = pg_type_to_ts\(col\)
        nullable = col_name not in required
        if nullable:
            lines.append\(f'          {col_name}?: {ts_type} | null'\)
        else:
            lines.append\(f'          {col_name}?: {ts_type}'\)
    lines.append\('        }'\)
    
    # Relationships placeholder
    lines.append\('        Relationships: []'\)
    
    lines.append\('      }'\)

lines.append\('    }'\)
lines.append\('    Views: {'\)
lines.append\('      [_ in never]: never'\)
lines.append\('    }'\)
lines.append\('    Functions: {'\)
lines.append\('      [_ in never]: never'\)
lines.append\('    }'\)
lines.append\('    Enums: {'\)
lines.append\('      [_ in never]: never'\)
lines.append\('    }'\)
lines.append\('    CompositeTypes: {'\)
lines.append\('      [_ in never]: never'\)
lines.append\('    }'\)
lines.append\('  }'\)
lines.append\('}'\)
lines.append\(''\)

output = '\\n'.join\(lines\)
with open\('/Users/benjaminmas/Documents/Claude AI/100000medecins/src/types/database.ts', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(output\)

print\(f'Generated database.ts with {len\(defs\)} tables'\)
PYEOF)
